ip_outcome_note: Confirmed Caterpie via card name, PokemonTCG.io API (swsh2-1, National Pokedex no. 10), artist Uta, and canonical green caterpillar with red-tipped antenna design.

trivia_bullets.text: Rebel Clash (RCL, Sword & Shield series) released May 1, 2020, as the second Sword & Shield expansion. 192 printed cards, 17 secret rares (209 total), regulation mark D. Featured VMAX: Rillaboom, Cinderace, Inteleon, Copperajah, Dragapult.

Two corpus Caterpie prints: RBC-001 (Uta, 2020, nighttime forest atmospheric scene) vs. EVO-3 (Ken Sugimori, 2016, flat-style Base Set tribute, plain background, daytime static pose). Same species, sharply different visual registers.
Flavor text: 'For protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antenna on its head to drive away enemies.' National Pokedex no. 10.

Adaptive Evolution ability (shared with adjacent RBC-002 Metapod) permits turn-one evolution, encoding Caterpie's canonically fast metamorphosis in TCG mechanics. Both cards form a coherent functional two-card unit.

related_cards.name: Metapod
related_cards.note: immediate evolution target, shares Adaptive Evolution, adjacent collector number

related_cards.name: Caterpie
related_cards.note: alternate corpus print, Ken Sugimori flat-style art, contrasting visual register

related_cards.name: Butterfree
related_cards.note: final evolution stage, not in corpus
